message:
fix: Arrow string decoding and bundled name references

- Add Arrow string format decoding in columnar result handler to properly
  convert _arrowString data (offsets + bytes) to JavaScript strings
- Fix bundled name mismatches: PureLanceWriter -> PureLanceWriter2,
  LANCE_FOOTER_SIZE -> 40, LANCE_MAGIC -> LANCE_MAGIC2
- Fix RemoteLanceDataset -> RemoteLanceDataset2 reference
- Add WASM env stubs for opfs_open, opfs_read, opfs_size, opfs_close, js_log
- Remove internal method tests per thin JS wrapper philosophy

Test results: 219 passed, 4 failed (array type serialization limitations)
